docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY CASHCALL INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BARIL, SHEILA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$38.00) SERVED APR-15-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BARIL, SHEILA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-17-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-17-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-25-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT AGREES TO MAKE INSTALLMENT PAYMENTS TOTALING $1500.00 PRINCIPAL PLUS 140.00 COURT COSTS (TOTAL $1640.00) TO BE PAID BY JANUARY 2012. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASHCALL INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-25-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-29-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-29-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-07-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NO APPEARANCES. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASHCALL INC.
